methodology.conservative_circulating_definition: Raw contract supply minus only verified reserve/backing/locked candidates. Exchange-routed, distributor, high-activity, unresolved, or unlabelled wallets are not excluded.
methodology.important_caveat: This is an on-chain estimate, not an official circulating supply. A definitive circulating supply requires verified lockups, reserve wallets, treasury wallets, market-maker wallets, exchange balances, and vesting schedules.

audit_interpretation: Under the current verified evidence set, only a small amount of ETH-side candidate backing is verified. The BSC supply remains largely unreconciled by verified backing candidates, so most BSC supply should be treated as potentially circulating or distribution-exposed unless additional locked/reserve wallets are verified.
